passage: Employees may request up to two remote-working days each week. The days must be agreed with a manager at least one week in advance. Staff may be asked to attend the office on a remote day when an essential team meeting is scheduled.
statement: Employees can choose any remote-working day without asking a manager.
evidence: The days must be agreed with a manager at least one week in advance.
explanation: The policy requires advance agreement from a manager, so the statement contradicts the notice.

passage: The central library is open from 10:00 to 16:00 on Saturdays and is closed on Sundays. Books can be returned through the secure slot beside the main entrance whenever the building is closed. Reserved books must be collected during opening hours.
statement: Library books can be returned when the building is closed.
evidence: Books can be returned through the secure slot beside the main entrance whenever the building is closed.
explanation: The statement agrees directly with the return instructions in the notice.

passage: Basic membership provides access to the fitness room from Monday to Friday. Weekend access can be added for a monthly fee. Use of the swimming pool is available only with the Plus membership or a separate day pass.
statement: Swimming pool access is included in the basic membership.
evidence: Use of the swimming pool is available only with the Plus membership or a separate day pass.
explanation: The statement contradicts the membership information. Basic membership does not include the pool.

passage: Residents must keep noise to a minimum between 10 p.m. and 7 a.m. Bicycles should be stored in the ground-floor rack rather than in hallways. Any pet kept in an apartment requires written approval from the building manager.
statement: Residents are allowed to keep a maximum of two pets in an apartment.
evidence: The rules require written approval for any pet but do not state how many pets a resident may keep.
explanation: The passage discusses approval but gives no maximum number, so the statement is Not Given.

passage: The CityGo card offers reduced fares after 9:30 a.m. on weekdays and throughout weekends. A new card remains valid for two years from the date of purchase. Users can add credit online or at ticket machines in major stations.
statement: A fee is charged to replace a lost CityGo card.
evidence: The information covers reduced fares, validity, and adding credit but says nothing about lost-card replacement fees.
explanation: The passage does not provide enough information about replacing a lost card.

passage: The community clean-up will take place on Saturday beside North River Park. Volunteers should arrive at 8:00 for equipment and safety instructions; public activities begin at 9:00. Gloves, drinking water, and lunch will be provided to registered volunteers.
statement: Registered volunteers will receive lunch at the event.
evidence: Gloves, drinking water, and lunch will be provided to registered volunteers.
explanation: The event notice directly confirms that registered volunteers receive lunch.

passage: The museum is seeking a full-time visitor services assistant. Previous customer-service experience is preferred, although training will be provided to the successful applicant. The role includes two weekend shifts each month.
statement: Applicants must have previous customer-service experience.
evidence: Previous customer-service experience is preferred, although training will be provided to the successful applicant.
explanation: Preferred does not mean required. The advertisement does not make previous experience compulsory.

passage: Everyone entering the workshop must wear closed-toe shoes. Safety glasses and protective gloves are stored in the cabinet next to the supervisor's desk. Report damaged equipment immediately and do not attempt repairs unless authorized.
statement: Safety helmets are available at the workshop entrance.
evidence: The instructions mention shoes, glasses, and gloves but provide no information about safety helmets.
explanation: Because helmets are not discussed, the statement is Not Given.

passage: The beginner photography course starts on 6 September and meets every Tuesday evening for eight weeks. The course fee includes printed materials and use of studio lighting. Fees cannot be refunded after the second class.
statement: Printed course materials are included in the fee.
evidence: The course fee includes printed materials and use of studio lighting.
explanation: The announcement explicitly says printed materials are included, so the statement is True.

passage: From Monday to Wednesday, Route 8 buses will avoid Central Street because of road repairs. A temporary stop will operate outside West Bank, and journeys may take about ten minutes longer. The usual route will return on Thursday morning.
statement: Route 8 will permanently stop serving Central Street.
evidence: The usual route will return on Thursday morning.
explanation: The change is temporary, not permanent, so the statement contradicts the update.
